title: tragoselinum magnum
side_effects: Tragoselinum magnum can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and stomach upset in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to liver damage and kidney strain. In rare cases, it has been linked to an increased risk of seizures, particularly in people with pre-existing epilepsy or other neurological conditions. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Tragoselinum magnum can cause more severe side effects, including interactions with other medications and exacerbating certain health conditions.
